summary: Tested Hintalaskuri (Price Calculator) SEO/Hero admin management feature. All features working correctly: Admin Laskuri tab shows 'Sivun SEO & Hero' expandable section with all 6 required fields. Admin Palvelusivut tab correctly hides hintalaskuri (shows only 6 service pages). Hintalaskuri frontend page shows correct sections (Hero, Trust bar, Calculator, Process, FAQ, Contact form, References, Footer CTA) and correctly removes redundant sections (DescriptionSection, FeaturesSection, WhyChooseSection, ServiceAreasSection). Save functionality works - both calculator config and page SEO data are saved together. Hero title and subtitle come from database.
passed_tests: Admin login works with admin/jbadmin2024
Admin Laskuri tab shows 'Sivun SEO & Hero' expandable section
Admin Laskuri tab SEO section has SEO-otsikko (title) field
Admin Laskuri tab SEO section has Meta-kuvaus field
Admin Laskuri tab SEO section has Hero-otsikko (H1) field
Admin Laskuri tab SEO section has Hero-alaotsikko field
Admin Laskuri tab SEO section has Hero-taustakuva URL field
Admin Laskuri tab SEO section has SEO-teksti (description_text) field
Admin Laskuri tab Tallenna button saves both calculator config AND page SEO data
Admin Palvelusivut tab does NOT show hintalaskuri in page list
Admin Palvelusivut tab shows exactly 6 service pages (hintalaskuri excluded)
Hintalaskuri frontend: Hero section present with title from database ('Hintalaskuri')
Hintalaskuri frontend: Hero subtitle from database ('Laske maalaus- ja tasoitustöiden hinta-arvio hetkessä')
Hintalaskuri frontend: Trust bar section present
Hintalaskuri frontend: Calculator widget section present
Hintalaskuri frontend: Service selection present
Hintalaskuri frontend: Process section (Työvaiheet) present
Hintalaskuri frontend: FAQ section (UKK) present
Hintalaskuri frontend: Contact form section present
Hintalaskuri frontend: References section present
Hintalaskuri frontend: Footer CTA (StrongCTA) present
Hintalaskuri frontend: DescriptionSection NOT present (correctly removed)
Hintalaskuri frontend: FeaturesSection (Mitä hintalaskuri kattaa) NOT present (correctly removed)
Hintalaskuri frontend: WhyChooseSection (Miksi käyttää hintalaskuria) NOT present (correctly removed)
Hintalaskuri frontend: ServiceAreasSection (Toimialue/Palvelualueet) NOT present (correctly removed)
critical_code_review_comments: CalculatorAdmin.js correctly fetches hintalaskuri page data in loadConfig (lines 34-39)
CalculatorAdmin.js correctly saves both calculator config and page SEO data in saveConfig (lines 47-66)
CalculatorAdmin.js has all 6 required SEO fields in the expandable section (lines 195-248)
ServicePagesAdmin.js correctly filters out hintalaskuri from page list (line 552: pages.filter(page => page.slug !== 'hintalaskuri'))
PriceCalculatorPage.js correctly uses pageData?.hero_title and pageData?.hero_subtitle for dynamic hero content
seed_data_creation: None - used existing hintalaskuri page data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 tested the Hintalaskuri SEO/Hero admin management feature. The feature moves SEO/Hero management from Palvelusivut tab to Laskuri tab for the hintalaskuri page. Admin Laskuri tab now has 'Sivun SEO & Hero' expandable section with 6 fields (SEO-otsikko, Meta-kuvaus, Hero-otsikko, Hero-alaotsikko, Hero-taustakuva URL, SEO-teksti). Palvelusivut tab filters out hintalaskuri (shows 6 pages instead of 7). Hintalaskuri frontend page shows simplified layout with Hero, Trust bar, Calculator, Process, FAQ, Contact form, References, and Footer CTA sections. Removed sections: DescriptionSection, FeaturesSection, WhyChooseSection, ServiceAreasSection.
